_comment: Fail-closed, DOWN-ONLY suite-honesty baseline. Generated by tools/check_suite_honesty.py --update-baseline. expected_fail_ceiling is the count of KNOWN-failing dimensions per backend; it may only DECREASE (fixing a test lowers it; the guard refuses to raise it). Every fail entry in differential_expectations.json is a debt with an owner (tracking + root_cause + evidence). See the script docstring and tools/suite_honesty/README.md.
